flavorText: Life clerics preserve and restore vitality with unmatched divine healing.

features.description: When you cast a spell that restores hit points, the creature regains extra hit points equal to 2 + the spell's level.
As Channel Divinity, restore hit points among creatures within 30 feet equal to 5 × your cleric level; this can't restore a creature above half its hit point maximum.
When you cast a healing spell on others, you regain hit points equal to 2 + the spell's level.
Once on each of your turns when you hit with a weapon attack, deal an extra 1d8 radiant damage (2d8 at 14th level).
When you would roll dice to restore hit points with a spell, use the highest number possible for each die instead.

life-domain-bonus-proficiency.summary: Start better armored and more comfortable standing in the middle of the party you are protecting.

life-domain-disciple-of-life.summary: Your healing spells become materially stronger, turning every slot into better party stabilization.
life-domain-disciple-of-life.description: Disciple of Life is what makes the Life cleric feel like a true specialist instead of “just another cleric who heals sometimes.” It should make healing choices visibly more efficient.

life-domain-preserve-life.summary: Redistribute a strong burst of emergency healing across the team when attrition starts breaking the party line.
life-domain-preserve-life.description: Preserve Life is the domain’s major save-the-party button. Use it when several allies are sliding at once and one quick mass correction matters more than flashy offense.

life-domain-blessed-healer.summary: When you heal others, you also keep yourself steadier, helping the healer stay active in the same fight.

life-domain-divine-strike.summary: Even the healing-focused domain keeps a bit of divine weapon pressure in reserve.

life-domain-supreme-healing.summary: Your healing magic becomes far more reliable when big recovery numbers truly matter.
life-domain-supreme-healing.description: Supreme Healing turns swingy healing into dependable stabilization. It matters most in dangerous late-game fights where every spell slot has to convert into meaningful recovery.
